title: I am a woman with money
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for carrying the identity of financial abundance into the day.
excerpt: A short affirmation practice from Day 22 of the MONEY program. Use in the morning to plant the identity statement before the day's choices begin.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 22 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning before the day starts, or any time you catch yourself about to make a decision from the old "just getting by" identity.

content.text: An affirmation from Day 22 of the MONEY program. Short, direct, present tense. The function is simple: to say the identity statement out loud before the day's choices are made, so the body hears it as the current frame rather than a future wish.
This affirmation states the new identity in full. No qualifier, no aspiration — present tense, complete. Say it with your hand on your heart if that helps it land.
I am a woman with money.

Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on heart. If the statement feels too large, say it anyway — the gap between the statement and the felt truth is precisely what the repetition closes over time.
Adapted from Day 22 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
